321 I6500_CTRCT_CD I6500_CTRCT_CD I6500 Active Diagnoses: Cataracts Glaucoma or Macular Degeneration Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident had an active diagnosis of cataracts, glaucoma or macular degeneration in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
